subject: docs(data): add DATA_EXTRACTION.md with full pipeline documentation
body:
Document the complete OSM data extraction pipeline — Overpass fetch,
transform, Nominatim reverse geocode, dedup migration, and Supabase
import. Includes API rate limits, field mappings, re-run instructions,
and network requirements so the pipeline can be reproduced or updated.

Tags: documentation, data, osm, nominatim
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: data-extraction
Semver: patch
